GM=Games played
KI=Kicks
MK=Marks

CP=Contested possessions
UP=Uncontested possessions

MI=Marks inside 50

BO=Bounces
GA=Goal assist
%P=Percentage of game played
SU=Sub (On/Off)
↑=subbed on
